What I do
  • 🗺️ Turn ambiguous problems into clear, prioritized roadmaps
  • 🤝 Build alignment across engineering, design, and business teams
  • 📊 Make data-driven decisions without losing sight of the human behind the data
  • 🚀 Ship products end-to-end — from ideation to launch and beyond

Featured Projects
Work I'm proud of.
Omnidian
Client Portal — Self-Serve Platform Transformation
Omnidian's clients needed better visibility into their solar assets — and our support team was drowning in manual back-and-forth. I led the push to make the Client Portal the center of gravity for all client engagement, shifting interactions toward self-serve and building the data infrastructure that now powers our internal reporting. The result was faster resolutions, less noise for our teams, and stickier client relationships.
Self-Serve Platform Data Infrastructure Client Experience BI & Analytics
50% Faster Resolution
~20% Velocity Gain
30% Less Manual Tracking
TargetX / Liaison International
Student Success Dashboards & CRM Launch

University administrators were flying blind when it came to at-risk students. I rebuilt the core advising dashboard from a basic task list into a data-driven platform — connecting signals across systems so advisors could identify at-risk students, spot trends, and act before problems compounded.

+42 NPS Points
75% Feature Adoption
+15% Monthly Active Users
View full case study →
Rainforest QA
Pay-As-You-Go Pricing & Onboarding Overhaul
Getting new customers through QA setup was painfully slow, and our pricing model was scaring off leads before they even started. I tackled both — rebuilding onboarding with in-app guided tours so customers could move at their own pace, and launching a pay-as-you-go pricing tier that removed the biggest barrier to entry. The sales cycle got a lot shorter, and customers stuck around longer.
Pricing Strategy Onboarding Self-Serve
70% Shorter Sales Cycle
+25% Retention
8x Faster Onboarding

Beyond the Roadmap
The person behind the PM.
That's me, ~age 7. #38. Still at it.
🏒 On the Ice

30+ years of early mornings and cold rinks.

I started playing hockey before I could really read, and I haven't stopped. I still lace up 1-2 times a week — because some things just stick with you.

Hockey taught me everything I know about team dynamics. How to read the room quickly, trust your linemates, and keep showing up even when things aren't going your way. That same instinct — stay in the game, adapt, support your team — is how I try to show up as a PM every day.

Yes, I do actually cook like this.
🍳 In the Kitchen

Feeding people is my greatest joy.

Cooking is where I go to be fully present. I love experimenting — a new technique, an unexpected ingredient, a dish I've never tried before. Half the time it works. The other half, I learn something.

There's a real parallel to product work here. You form a hypothesis, you test it, you taste it, you adjust. And when it comes together and the people around the table are happy — that's the feeling I'm always chasing.

Chamonix, France. Tour du Mont Blanc.
🌲 In the Wild

Nothing resets me like being outside.

On a sunny day you'll find me hiking in the woods, biking to a brewery with friends, or planning my next adventure. Every year I do a whitewater rafting and camping trip with my crew — it's become a non-negotiable.

Being outside reminds me to zoom out. The best ideas I've had — the ones that actually changed something — usually came after I stepped away from the screen and let my brain breathe.
